issues.description: Action type 'AttachDon' is incorrect. The card effect gives (transfers) a rested DON!! card that already exists on board to Leader/Character, not attaches a new DON!!. Should use 'GiveDon' with a source scope for rested DON!! cards, or clarify this is a special transfer mechanic. Current DSL implies creating/attaching DON!!, not moving existing rested ones.
Missing 'Once Per Turn' limitation in DSL. Card text specifies '[Once Per Turn]' which should be reflected in the effect structure (e.g., via a frequency/limit constraint).

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] Give up to 1 rested DON!! card to your Leader or 1 of your Characters.
